name: Emblasoft Evolver
description: Service assurance, validation and testing for mobile network services — from 5G SA to legacy. A single cloud-native platform covering active monitoring, functional testing, performance testing and service enablement across any network.
howItWorks: Evolver deploys distributed active agents that run synthetic transactions — voice, data, messaging, video — across the network using full stack L7 protocols. Hundreds of test cases execute via REST API integration with CI/CD/CT orchestration. A powerful script editor enables custom scenarios. Rich KPI reporting, alarms and flexible dashboards deliver real-time and historical insight. Evolver reproduces issues detected in live traffic under controlled conditions, confirming fixes by rerunning the same scenario in the live network.
